intro: Calonema evanescens, also known as the evanescent Calonema, is a rare and short-lived orchid species native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The bioactive constituents of Calonema evanescens include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
